mapper.select: SELECT a.SNO AS sno, a.LIST_NO AS listNo, a.REC_NO AS recNo, u.USERNAME AS custName, c.CAMP_NAME AS campName, a.RECALL_TIME AS recallTime, a.REC_TIME AS recTime, l.LIST_LASTPHONE AS listLastphone, c.CAMP_SERVICE_DT AS campServiceDt FROM tb_call_appointment a JOIN tb_call_list l ON a.LIST_NO = l.LIST_NO JOIN tb_cust_user u ON l.MEMBER_ID = u.MEMBER_ID JOIN tb_camp_mst c ON a.CAMP_CODE = c.CAMP_CODE WHERE a.RECALL_TIME BETWEEN TIMESTAMP(#{request.startDate}, #{request.startTime}) AND TIMESTAMP(#{request.endDate}, #{request.endTime}) AND a.REC_TIME IS NULL ORDER BY a.RECALL_TIME
